{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/49950206?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Ryoga-exe", "id": 49950206, "login": "Ryoga-exe", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ5OTUwMjA2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ryoga-exe", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "## Summary Astro's server-side View Transition CSS generator interpolates animation properties into an inline `` sequence, terminate the generated style element, and inject arbitrary HTML or JavaScript. This is similar to GHSA-8hv8-536x-4wqp, but exploits a different injection point: unescaped View Transition animation values in a server-generated ``)); ``` Animation properties are added to the stylesheet without escaping: ```ts if (anim.duration) { addAnimationProperty(builder, 'animation-duration', toTimeValue(anim.duration)); } ``` For string values, `toTimeValue()` returns the input unchanged: ```ts export function toTimeValue(num: number | string) { return typeof num === 'number' ? num + 'ms' : num; } ``` As a result, a `duration` value containing `` can escape from the generated style element. Other `TransitionAnimation` properties, including `easing`, `direction`, `delay`, `fillMode`, and `name`, are serialized by the same animation builder. The following PoC only relies on the official `fade()` helper and its `duration` option. ## PoC Using: - `astro@7.0.9` - `@astrojs/node@11.0.2` ### `astro.config.mjs` ```js import node from '@astrojs/node'; import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config'; export default defineConfig({ output: 'server', adapter: node({ mode: 'standalone' }), }); ``` ### `src/pages/index.astro` ```astro --- import { fade } from 'astro:transitions'; const duration = Astro.url.searchParams.get('duration') ?? '300ms'; --- PoC
Animated content
``` ### Payload: open: ```text http://localhost:4321/?duration=%3C%2Fstyle%3E%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C%2Fscript%3E%3C!-- ``` The browser interprets `` as the end of the generated style element and executes the injected script. An alert dialog is displayed when the page is opened. ## Impact An attacker who can control a View Transition animation value can execute arbitrary JavaScript in the origin of the affected Astro application. The query-based reflected XSS scenario affects on-demand/server-rendered routes, such as: - projects configured with `output: "server"`; - pages using `export const prerender = false`; - other server-side data flows that pass attacker-controlled values into a View Transition animation definition. Successful exploitation may allow access to sensitive page data and authenticated actions available to the victim. ## Suggested Fix Animation values should be serialized using context-appropriate CSS escaping or validation before being added to the generated stylesheet. Additionally, content inserted into a raw ``. The final generated CSS should be made safe for the HTML raw-text context before it is passed to `markHTMLString()`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-20T21:08:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-20T21:08:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/withastro/astro/security/advisories/GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6", "https://github.com/withastro/astro/pull/17393", "https://github.com/withastro/astro/commit/092da560eea77ee63a3e2c583c80d8238544e42b", "https://github.com/withastro/astro/releases/tag/astro@7.1.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/withastro/astro/security-advisories/GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/withastro/astro", "summary": "Astro: Reflected XSS via unescaped View Transition animation properties", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T21:08:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4g3v-8h47-v7g6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "astro"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.9.0, <= 7.0.9"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
title: Astro: Reflected XSS via unescaped View Transition animation properties
